'''Sabran''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Sabran was well known within the Imperial Navy for her fluency in over 300 alien languages. However, she was sent to an Imperial prison after being framed for leaking information to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. [[Janq Paramexor]], a leading bounty hunter, had heard of her skills and arranged for her to be freed in return for Sabran joining his [[House Paramexor|guild]]. She agreed and put her training and skills to work for Paramexor's organization.
